description_long: This is a tall, rectangular stone obelisk with a classical design, mounted on a broad, stepped base. The front face features a prominent inscription panel, with engraved text commemorating individuals, and a sculpted scroll or plaque at the lower section. Decorative elements, such as volutes and carved motifs, adorn the upper corners of the base, adding an ornate touch. The obelisk shaft rises vertically and is topped with a sculpted figure, possibly representing a person or symbolic statue, which is weathered and partially eroded. The stone surface shows signs of aging, with discoloration and patina, suggesting exposure to the elements over time. The overall structure is solid and imposing, typical of memorials or monuments found in urban parks or cemeteries.
description: A tall, rectangular stone obelisk with ornate carvings, inscriptions, and a sculpted figure on top, mounted on a broad, stepped base. The surface is weathered and aged, with decorative motifs and commemorative text.
description_view_0: Side view showing the narrow profile of the obelisk and the stepped base, with the sculpted figure visible at the top.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the plain back face of the obelisk, with minimal decoration and no visible inscriptions.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, showing the narrow profile and the layered base structure.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the main inscription panel, decorative scroll, and ornate upper corners, with the sculpted figure clearly visible at the top.
attribute_inscription: The front face contains engraved text in English, commemorating individuals such as James Donaldson and others. The inscription is located on a rectangular panel and is moderately legible, with some weathering affecting clarity.
attribute_ornamentation: Decorative volutes and carved motifs are present at the upper corners of the base, and a sculpted scroll or plaque is featured below the inscription panel. The top is adorned with a sculpted figure.
attribute_base_design: The base is broad and stepped, rectangular in shape, with a slightly projecting lower platform. It features decorative carvings and a scroll motif on the front, and is constructed from the same stone as the obelisk.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is crowned with a sculpted figure, possibly a person or symbolic statue, with a weathered and eroded finish. The figure stands atop the shaft, providing a distinct focal point.
